pr.title: Record: Fort Knox — Legal Packed Training Cache, Zero Val Adaptation (val_bpb 0.0638, 3-seed)

output.summary: Blends a frozen 6L transformer with a packed training-only n-gram cache and zero validation adaptation to establish an ultra-conservative legality baseline.
techniques: Packed training-only n-gram cache serialized with the artifact and blended into inference
Zero val-data adaptation—no caches, TTT, or calibration during evaluation
Temperature sharpening (T=0.85) applied to frozen model logits before softmax
